notes: Iter 20: NEW HYPOTHESIS — 3-year drawdown window. Longer rolling peak smooths the regime signal: a market grind-down doesn't immediately trigger R2/R3 because the rolling-3y peak only updates as old peaks scroll out. Strategy stays in R1 (compounding) longer. Wider R1 band (10-16%) since longer window means fewer false R1 exits. R2 cash relaxed to [0.5, 1.0] (from 0.6 in iter 19) so optimizer can pick more equity in R2 if signals confirm safety. Goal: capture iter 13's CAGR (~27%) while keeping DD better than iter 18's -36.7%.
